name: Retro Cut
short_description: Play as a ... triangle? Cut through hordes of enemies and level up in this action roguelike!
detailed_description: Equipped with artifacts, relics, time manipulation skills and a trusty blade, slice and dice through hordes of enemies. Contains 7 different enemies, 2 bosses, infinite level and random relic generation, 18 different artifacts, 9 different weapons and 5 unique stance combos. Experiment with the different combinations of abilities to craft the best setup and advance into increasingly difficult levels. Instead of the usual guns and mindless spraying of bullets, perform calculated, devastating cuts and combo strikes. Slow down time to strategise attacks and blocks, but be mindful or you will overheat!
